meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to master user onboarding and overcome project paralysis. A beginner-level guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to build.
content.answer_block: Overcoming project paralysis starts by narrowing your focus to a single high-impact feature: user onboarding. By building a frictionless sign-up flow, you solve a universal SaaS problem while creating a tangible, portfolio-ready project. Use Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code to automate implementation, turning blank-page anxiety into a functional milestone.
content.intro:
The screen is a blinding, empty white expanse. You have the ambition to build, but the 'what' remains a phantom, slipping through your fingers every time you sit down to code. This isn't a failure of talent; it’s a failure of scope. Most students stall because they try to build the next Facebook instead of focusing on the microscopic, high-value interactions that actually make software work.

User onboarding is the heartbeat of every successful SaaS product. It is the bridge between a visitor and a power user. By mastering this single, contained feature, you stop chasing 'big ideas' and start engineering solutions that real companies pay to solve. Let’s transform your blank screen into a functional, professional onboarding engine.

steps.title: Define the User Journey
steps.description: Map out the essential steps a user takes from landing on your page to their 'Aha!' moment. Keep it under three interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user flow diagram for a 3-step SaaS onboarding process that collects email, verifies identity, and triggers a welcome email.

steps.title: Scaffold the Data Schema
steps.description: Design a lightweight database schema to store user states during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a User model with fields: email, onboarding_step (enum), and is_verified boolean.

steps.title: Build the UI Component
steps.description: Create a responsive onboarding modal that guides the user through your defined steps without page reloads.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React/Tailwind component for a multi-step onboarding modal with animated progress bars.

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Connect your frontend to your backend to ensure user progress is saved in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write an API route in Next.js that updates the user's current onboarding step in the database.

steps.title: Add Edge-Case Validation
steps.description: Ensure your onboarding flow handles errors like invalid emails or network timeouts gracefully.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Zod validation for user email inputs and error handling for the onboarding API route.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time-to-Value': Every input field you add to onboarding increases drop-off by 15%. Keep it brutal.
Use 'Shadow State': Store onboarding progress in local storage before pushing to the DB to ensure a snappy UX.
Instrument early: Add analytics events to every onboarding step; knowing where users drop off is more valuable than the code itself.
Copy the giants: Spend 30 minutes clicking through the onboarding of apps like Linear or Notion; they have spent millions optimizing those flows.
Fail gracefully: Always provide a 'Skip' button. Forcing users into a workflow they don't want is the fastest way to lose them.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, integrate a real email provider like Resend to trigger a welcome sequence, then deploy to Vercel to share your link.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the workflow of a senior dev. Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start engineering the perfect execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
